name: inbox-watch
description: SessionStart hook that scans the current repo's `inbox/{notes,patches,poc,rfc_drafts}/*.md` for open entries (no `status:` frontmatter value, OR a value not in {closed, resolved, done, merged, ack}) and emits a one-shot snapshot as `additionalContext` — `# inbox: N open` + bullet list (cap 5, most-recently-modified). Empty / no inbox dir → silent. Implemented in hexa-lang (`_inbox_watch.hexa`, invoked via `hexa run`). Makes cross-project handoff entries visible at session start so they never sit unread. NO opt-out by design (commons @D g30).
